name: Case ProjectAegis: IP & Source Code Theft
description: Investigation into an intellectual property breach at Aegis Corp. A senior developer is suspected of leaking proprietary autonomous driving source code to a foreign competitor via encrypted messaging apps.

anomalies.description: Sent secure files named 'aegis_adas_v5.tar.gz' to unverified competitor phone number.
anomalies.evidence: Elena Kovalenko sent attachment 'aegis_adas_v5.tar.gz' (240MB) via WhatsApp to Dr. Chen Wei.
anomalies.recommendation: Extract media metadata from the database. Check company VPN logs for Git downloads preceding this time.

anomalies.description: Elena Kovalenko pinged within 50 meters of the rival company's liaison office during non-work hours.
anomalies.evidence: GPS places Elena at 450 Broadway Ste 4 (Rival Corp Liaison Office) at 9:30 PM on a Friday.
anomalies.recommendation: Cross-reference with security logs to see if her work laptop connected to local public WiFi.

timeline.content: Got the latest update of the sensor fusion model. Packaging it now.
Received. Transferring funds to your offshore account. Delete these logs.
Understood. Wiping local logs and key files.

presets.query: Show files transferred by Elena to the competitor.
presets.translation: SELECT filename, recipient, timestamp FROM media_logs WHERE actor = 'Elena Kovalenko' AND (filename LIKE '%.tar.gz%' OR filename LIKE '%.zip%')
presets.summary: The AI identified a file leakage event. On May 14 at 7:05 PM, Elena Kovalenko sent a compressed archive **'aegis_adas_v5.tar.gz'** (242 MB) to Dr. Chen Wei via WhatsApp, right after cloning the main repository from the internal Aegis Git Server.
suggestions: Analyze Signal chat logs around the file transfer timestamp.

presets.query: Search for instructions to wipe logs or delete chat history.
presets.translation: SELECT * FROM chat_logs WHERE message LIKE '%delete%' OR message LIKE '%wipe%' OR message LIKE '%clear%'
presets.summary: Anti-forensic actions detected. On May 14 at 7:08 PM and 7:15 PM, chat messages between Dr. Chen Wei and Elena Kovalenko coordinate the wiping of local logs and critical source code files following the offshore transaction.

results.message: Received. Transferring funds to your offshore account. Delete these logs.
Understood. Wiping local logs and key files.

suggestions: Inspect file system for deleted db-wal files.

presets.query: Check location logs for Elena Kovalenko's off-work movements.
presets.intent: Trace suspect movement and co-location anomalies
presets.translation: SELECT timestamp, coordinates, content FROM location_logs WHERE actor = 'Elena Kovalenko' AND severity = 'Suspicious'
presets.summary: A suspicious location log on Friday, May 15 at 9:30 PM places Elena Kovalenko at **450 Broadway (Rival Liaison Office)**, correlating to the timing of the suspect IP theft campaign.
suggestions: Query WiFi connection logs for public hotspots.
Analyze surveillance camera feeds around Broadway.
